title: Stop AI Hallucinations With These 5 Techniques
summary: AWS Developers presents five techniques to reduce AI hallucinations and token waste in agentic systems: semantic tool selection to filter context, Graph RAG for precise queries, multi-agent validation for verification, symbolic guardrails implemented in Python, and runtime steering for self-correction. Demonstrations use Strands Agents framework with comparisons to AWS Bedrock AgentCore in production.
